subject: Duke Nicholas School — updated funding details for your application
body_preview: Darren, one correction to what is still posted on the program page. For the 2027 cohort the guaranteed PhD funding package is 38,600 per year over five years, not the 34,800 figure the older page shows, and the application deadline moved up to January 8, 2027. The GRE is now fully waived for applicants with a completed undergraduate research thesis.

subject: UNC Wilmington MS Marine Biology — assistantship correction
body_preview: Hi Darren, following up on your inquiry. Please note the stipend line for incoming MS students was revised for 2027 to 24,800 with the full tuition remission, up from the 22,500 you may have seen earlier. Our deadline remains February 15, 2027 and we do not require the GRE.

subject: University of Miami Rosenstiel — deadline and fellowship update
body_preview: Darren, thanks for reaching out. Two updates. The PhD application deadline is now December 15, 2026, moved earlier from January. The fellowship stipend is 35,500 for the entering class, revised from the 32,000 figure that is still on some third party sites. GRE remains optional.

subject: MIT-WHOI Joint Program — application logistics
body_preview: Hello Darren, confirming the Biological Oceanography deadline of December 15, 2026 and the full funding package of 41,000 per year. Our focus is cold water and deep sea systems, so if coral recovery is your primary interest you may find the fit narrow. Happy to connect you with faculty either way.

subject: College of Charleston Grice — funding clarification
body_preview: Hi Darren, to clarify since our page is out of date, the Grice MS now does carry a modest stipend of 14,000 alongside the partial tuition waiver for 2027, where previously there was no stipend at all. Deadline is January 10, 2027 and the GRE is still required.

subject: UC Santa Barbara Bren — cohort funding note
body_preview: Darren, our MS is professional and largely self funded, no guaranteed stipend, deadline January 15, 2027, GRE waived. Worth flagging our program is temperate kelp and policy focused rather than coral, in case that shifts your ranking.

subject: University of Hawaii HIMB — RA line and requirements
body_preview: Aloha Darren, the coral group RA line is 30,200 for 2027, revised up from the 28,000 on the older page, deadline January 1, 2027, and we now waive the GRE for thesis track applicants. Strong coral recovery match here if you can manage the distance.

subject: UNC Chapel Hill IMS — deadline reminder
body_preview: Darren, a reminder our Morehead City MS deadline is January 5, 2027, TA support is 19,000, and the GRE is required with no waiver available this cycle. Let me know if you plan a lab visit.
